_comment: Incident-response routing filter applied via the Azure MCP SRE tools. Symptom-keyed: all student-facing Zava alerts route to the custom zava-incident-responder agent, which scopes the skill menu (allowedSkills + system skills) and prescribes the ordered runbook (triage -> mitigate -> RCA -> evidence -> recommendations -> PR -> Change Request -> report) via its instructions and critic-on-handoff gate. Cause-level split (NSG vs LB vs AppGW vs app) happens inside the runbook from telemetry, never by alert name. @@INCIDENT_PLATFORM@@ is substituted (PagerDuty | AzMonitor) by scripts/configure-agent.ps1.
name: zava-learning-response
